settings.heading: Awards & Gifts That Recognize What Matters

settings.text: From employee-of-the-month trophies to executive retirement plaques, we help businesses and organizations create recognition moments that people remember. Bulk pricing, custom engraving, and white-glove fulfillment — all in one place.

settings.title: Custom Engraving
settings.text: Every award is laser-engraved with your recipient's name, title, achievement, and company logo. No minimum order required for personalization.

settings.title: Bulk Order Pricing
settings.text: The more you order, the more you save. Volume discounts start at 10 units. Perfect for annual award ceremonies, team events, and employee recognition programs.

settings.title: White-Glove Fulfillment
settings.text: We handle production, quality control, packaging, and shipping. Drop-ship directly to your event venue or individual recipients — we coordinate everything.

settings.title: Rush Orders Available
settings.text: Need awards fast? We offer expedited production on most items. Contact us with your deadline and we'll do everything we can to deliver on time.

settings.title: Branded Packaging
settings.text: Add your company logo to gift boxes, ribbon, and presentation materials. Recipients will remember your brand from the moment they open the box.

settings.title: Dedicated Account Rep
settings.text: Large orders and ongoing programs get a dedicated contact. We learn your brand, your preferences, and your people — so ordering is easy every time.

settings.title: Trophies & Crystal Awards
settings.text: Premium crystal, glass, and metal awards for top performers, annual ceremonies, and executive recognition. Laser-engraved to perfection.

settings.title: Engraved Plaques
settings.text: Wall plaques in wood, metal, and acrylic — ideal for "Employee of the Month," service milestones, board recognition, and office display.

settings.title: Corporate Client Gifts
settings.text: Personalized keepsakes for clients, partners, and VIPs. From engraved desk accessories to premium gift sets — gifts they'll use and remember.

settings.title: 1. Request a Quote
settings.text: Tell us what you need: product type, quantity, engraving details, delivery date, and budget. We'll respond within 1 business day with pricing and options.

settings.title: 2. Approve Your Proof
settings.text: We'll send a digital proof of your engraving layout before production begins. You can request revisions at no charge until you're 100% satisfied.

settings.title: 3. We Produce & Ship
settings.text: Once approved, we move into production. Your order ships with full tracking, delivered to your door or directly to your event venue.

settings.title: ★★★★★ — Rachel D., HR Director
settings.text: "We've used ModernTimez for our annual employee awards for three years running. The quality is exceptional, the engraving is always perfect, and they never miss our deadline. Highly recommended."

settings.title: ★★★★★ — Marcus T., Event Planner
settings.text: "Ordered 85 crystal awards for a gala with a 2-week turnaround. Every single one arrived flawlessly engraved and packaged. The account rep kept me updated the whole time. Outstanding."

settings.title: ★★★★★ — Priya S., Operations Manager
settings.text: "From custom plaques for our leadership team to personalized thank-you gifts for clients — ModernTimez handles it all. Professional, reliable, and the products look incredible."
Tell us about your program and we'll put together a proposal within 1 business day. No commitment required — just a conversation.
